stories.headline: OpenAI will now let companies reserve compute so their AI apps don't slow down
stories.blurb: OpenAI's new Guaranteed Capacity lets businesses pre-book processing power for their AI applications. Sam Altman said the company will still keep enough capacity for ChatGPT and Codex, but enterprises can now pay to ensure their custom models run at consistent speeds even during peak times.
stories.why_it_matters: Companies building on OpenAI can finally avoid the performance lottery that comes with shared infrastructure
stories.original_headline: OpenAI announces new Guaranteed Capacity offering for customers to secure compute

stories.headline: Google is shipping smart glasses again, this time built around Gemini
stories.blurb: Google will release new AI-powered smart glasses this fall — its first since Google Glass flopped over a decade ago. The glasses let you talk to Gemini and get visual answers from what you're looking at, similar to Meta's Ray-Ban glasses but with Google's AI assistant baked in.
stories.why_it_matters: Wearable AI is getting another shot now that the tech actually works conversationally.
stories.original_headline: Google to release first smart glasses since Google Glass flop

stories.headline: Cursor now lets AI iterate on code in hidden workspaces
stories.blurb: Cursor's new Shadow Workspace feature spins up invisible Electron windows and uses kernel-level folder proxies to let AI agents test and refine code changes in the background—without touching your actual project files or interrupting your work.
stories.why_it_matters: AI can now experiment freely while you keep coding, no git branches or manual cleanup required.
stories.original_headline: Shadow Workspace: Iterating on Code in the Background

stories.headline: Google just launched Gemini 3.5 with live web access and tool use
stories.blurb: Gemini 3.5 can now search the web in real time, run code, and use external tools while answering questions—making it more like an agent than a chatbot. It's available today in Gemini Advanced and through the API, with a 1-million-token context window and improved performance on coding and math benchmarks.
stories.why_it_matters: Google's flagship model can finally act on information, not just retrieve it.

try_this_prompt.title: The jargon translator
try_this_prompt.prompt: I'm about to paste something I wrote that probably sounds like I swallowed a whitepaper. Rewrite it so a smart 19-year-old would understand every sentence on first read. Keep my structure. Keep my point. Kill every word that exists only to sound professional.
try_this_prompt.tool_hint: Before sending anything to customers, execs, or humans outside your team.

daily_question: If you could reserve guaranteed compute for one AI workflow at your job, what would it be?
